full_text:
Cell count 1): very clear indi. cells

total: 3.68 E6

live: 2.61 E6

viability: 70.8 %

size: 9.1 um

Cell count 2):

total: 3.22 E6

live: 2.41 E6

viability: 74.8 %

size: 10.4 um

Total cell count: 3.45 e6 / mL

Total volume: 10 mL

A) RNA/DNA extraction (30 drops) + FFPE sample (4 drops) + Flow organoid (12 drops):

48-well plate

DNA/RNA + FFPE + flow: 46 wells x 40 µl x = 1840 µl → round up to 1900 uL

1500 cells/µl = 2.85E6

→ make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 950 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: uL

ORG full medium → uL

ome-gel → 134 µl

aprotinin → 2.9 µl

thrombin → 2.9 µl

fibrinogen → 19 µl

→ Let it solidify for 60 min - add 350 uL medium

B) Drug treatment for IF:

384-well plate

Leave outer wells empty = in total plate 308 wells 308 wells x 20 µl = 6160 µl

1000 cells/µl = 6.16E6 cells

→ make 2x of 3500 uL on a reservoir

volume to take from cell suspension: 893 uL

ORG full medium → 2022 uL

ome-gel → 493.5 µl

aprotinin → 10.5 µl

thrombin → 10.5 µl

fibrinogen → 70 µl

→ Let it solidify for 40-60 min - add 25 uL medium

→ Next day add drugs using Tecan drug dispenser

D) Sample for Flow - Day 0

→ Collect 1.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

E) Sample for cryo

→ Collect 4.3 e6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker (x 6 vials)

plate (1): For DNA & RNA

Drops plated on non-cell culture treated 24 well plates (Greiner) to test whether we could avoid cells dropping on the bottom.

plate (2): For Flow & FFPE

Drug treatment conditions (B):

Treatment done on 384-well plate for 25 uL. See plate layout

Next day:

Cultures

Treatment

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02

DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA
DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA
DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA
DNA | DNA | DNA | RNA | RNA | RNA

Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | | 
Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | | 
Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | | 
Flow | Flow | Flow | FFPE | |
